q:
In the system of equations

$$ \begin{aligned} & a x+b y+c z=A \\ & b x+c y+a z=B \\ & c x+a y+b z=C \end{aligned} $$

$A, B, C$ are the cofactors of $a, b, c$ in the determinant

$$ \left|\begin{array}{lll} a & b & c \\ b & c & a \\ c & a & b \end{array}\right| . $$

Then find the value of

$$ \frac{\left(a^2+b^2+c^2-a b-b c-c a\right)(a+b+c)}{\left(3 x y z-x^3-y^3-z^3\right)} $$
